title: Resolver imprevistos
description: Comprender un problema, proponer y evaluar soluciones.

lessons.title: Resolver imprevistos · 1
lessons.description: Aprende cuatro elementos nuevos y practícalos de inmediato.

activities.prompt: Resolver imprevistos
activities.explanation: Escucha primero. Después relaciona la forma escrita con su significado.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: I have a reservation in my name.
activities.explanation: Tengo una reserva a mi nombre.
activities.audio: I have a reservation in my name.
activities.slow_audio: I have a reservation in my name.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «I have a reservation in my name.»?
activities.target: I have a reservation in my name.
options: Tengo una reserva a mi nombre.
activities.answer: Tengo una reserva a mi nombre.
activities.explanation: «I have a reservation in my name.» significa «Tengo una reserva a mi nombre.».
activities.audio: I have a reservation in my name.
activities.slow_audio: I have a reservation in my name.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: That will not solve the problem.
I have a reservation in my name.
Thank you for solving the problem.
activities.answer: I have a reservation in my name.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «I have a reservation in my name.»: Tengo una reserva a mi nombre.
activities.audio: I have a reservation in my name.
activities.slow_audio: I have a reservation in my name.
